.github/workflows/maven-publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 1.8 for the build environment.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'source' and 'target' compiler configuration with the modern 'release' flag.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.why_exists: Using 'source' and 'target' separately is deprecated in favor of 'release' for cross-compilation and API compliance; while not strictly a compile error, it is the required modern pattern for Java 21 builds.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Replace deprecated @Configuration annotation with Spring Boot 3.3+ @AutoConfiguration for auto-configuration classes.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.3 deprecates using @Configuration on auto-configuration classes in favor of @AutoConfiguration to enable native image optimization and reduce classpath scanning overhead; while not a hard compile error yet, it is a required migration step for the target framework version.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Framework version to a version compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.3.
Remove the javax.annotation-api dependency as it is no longer needed or provided by the JDK/Spring Boot in the new stack.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a newer version.
Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
Replace deprecated @Configuration annotation with Spring Boot 3.3+ @AutoConfiguration for auto-configuration classes.
Update imports to use the new org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.AutoConfiguration class instead of the legacy context.annotation.Configuration.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
